zh.lifeSummary: 當Egelina Vautort於大約1305年出生在英國時，她的父親Hugh Vautort37歲，母親Lucy Brett32歲。她於1327年與Oliver Champernowne在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 塔福頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.St. Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 恩德利

zh-hans.North Tawton, Devon, England: 英国戴文諾斯 塔福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Egelina Vautort于大约1305年出生在英国时，她的父亲Hugh Vautort37岁，母亲Lucy Brett32岁。她于1327年与Oliver Champernowne在英国英格兰戴文諾斯 塔福頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Egelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the girl's name Evelyn , or a combination of Eve with the suffix -lina.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Egelina Vautort was born about 1305, in England, her father, Hugh Vautort, was 37 and her mother, Lucy Brett, was 32. She married Oliver Champernowne in 1327, in North Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1346, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egelina Vautort est née environ 1305, à Angleterre, son père, Hugh Vautort, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lucy Brett, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Oliver Champernowne en 1327, à North Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1346, dans sa ville natale.

de.St. Endellion, Cornwall, England: St Endellion, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Egelina Vautort um 1305 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Vautort 37 und ihre Mutter Lucy Brett 32. Sie hat 1327 in North Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Oliver Champernowne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1346 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina Vautort è nata il circa 1305 nel England, sua padre, Hugh Vautort, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lucy Brett, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Oliver Champernowne nel 1327, nel North Tawton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1346, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Egelina Vautortが約1305年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Hugh Vautortは37歳，母Lucy Brettは32歳であった。1327年にイギリスイギリスデボンノース タウトンでOliver Champernowneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Egelina Vautort(이)가 대략 1305년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Vautort(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Brett(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 타w턴에서 Oliver Champernowne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina Vautort nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Vautort, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Brett, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Oliver Champernowne em 1327, em North Tawton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1346, em sua cidade natal.

ro.St. Endellion, Cornwall, England: St Endellion, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egelina Vautort родилась около 1305 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Vautort было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Brett, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Oliver Champernowne в 1327 г. в местности норт тавтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1346 г. в её родном городе.

Se casó con Oliver Champernowne en 1327, en North Tawton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1346, en su pueblo.
